items.title: Democratic socialists top MAGA candidates among voters in CNBC's All-America poll
items.description: The survey's findings come as democratic socialist candidates win Democratic primaries following the 2025 election of New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani.

items.title: Economic outlook is worsening and Trump is getting blamed, CNBC survey finds
items.description: The public is as depressed about the economy as it has been since the years just after the pandemic, according to the All-America Economic Survey.

items.title: Netflix stock falls as earnings forecast disappoints, company says it will give fewer engagement updates
items.description: The streaming giant said it would cut back on the frequency of its "What We Watched" reports, which provide a picture of engagement.

items.title: Chinese automakers are taking on the UK — and many Brits are embracing it
items.description: The surge comes as China's auto exports have boomed in recent years as the country's appetite for new models has cooled.

items.title: World’s largest olive oil company says market has 'definitively' entered new phase
items.description: The update comes as analysts raise concerns about the prospect of global olive oil supplies swinging dramatically from one season to the next.

items.title: California's billionaire tax: What's at risk for the biggest state economy in America
items.description: California's billionaire tax would generate quick revenue, but Norway's example shows the longer-term economic impact of targeting the wealthy is unclear.

items.title: Apple, Nvidia vie for title of world's most valuable company
items.description: Nvidia shares have underperformed in 2026 as Wall Street shifts to companies powering the infrastructure AI buildout.

items.title: Amazon's Zoox issues software recall after robotaxi drove into heavy smoke
items.description: Last month, an unoccupied Zoox robotaxi drove into an active emergency fire scene that was clouded with smoke, the company said.

items.title: Fighter jet maker Saab smashes expectations as CEO urges procurement rethink
items.description: European governments ramp up defense spending and book orders with the region's companies.

items.title: Seven & i shares end 3.6% higher on report of stake talks with Polish convenience chain Zabka
items.description: Shares of Seven & i Holdings Co. jumped after a report said the company was looking to buy a stake in Poland's Zabka Group.

items.title: Import prices post surprise gain as costs of goods from China hit highest since 2008
items.description: Import prices were up 0.3% for the month, as a drop in energy was more than offset by increases elsewhere.

items.title: SpaceX stock sinks after Starship test flight aborted, pacing for a six-day losing streak
items.description: SpaceX's stock plunged further on Friday, a day after it aborted a test flight for its Starship rocket at the last second.

items.title: Iran says civilian infrastructure hit by latest U.S. strikes, expands attacks to Syria, Bahrain
items.description: The escalating standoff comes as the fragile truce signed by the U.S. and Iran last month showed further signs of unravelling

items.title: Oil prices rise after Kuwait says Iran attacked water desalination and power plant
items.description: Fighting between the U.S. and Iran escalated.

items.title: Inside the Chinese fraud rings stealing billions from banks and retailers
items.description: Chinese organized crime groups are making as much as $1 billion annually in tap-to-pay fraud schemes targeting retailers and banks.

items.title: ConocoPhillips to buy 42% stake in Iraqi unit from BP as U.S. seeks to weaken Iran's energy hold
items.description: BP and ConocoPhillips are set to announce billions of dollars of new investments in Iraq on Friday.

items.title: Homebuyer affordability slipped for fifth straight month, real estate index shows
items.description: With both home prices and mortgage rates climbing since earlier this year, affording a home has become harder, according to a housing affordability index.

items.title: How big is the great wealth transfer? It could be over $100 trillion or $36 trillion
items.description: Two studies have raised new questions about the size and impact of the coming great wealth transfer.

items.title: Elon Musk's Memphis AI empire is the epicenter of the data center backlash
items.description: Data center-related policy proposals, protests and litigation are underway across the country citing Colossus and Memphis as a cautionary tale.

items.title: Obscure volatility measure points to a 'Magnificent Seven’ earnings breakout
items.description: If the S&P 500 is to make a new record, it may require the "Magnificent Seven" to get back into gear.
